zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Aldrich於1501年出生在英國諾福爾可曼格林 霍爾時，他的父親Thomas Aldrich24歲，母親Elizabeth Wood24歲。他於1526年與Ciceley Bishop在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和12個女兒的父母。他去世於1559年11月6日在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年58歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可斯沃德斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Aldrich于1501年出生在英国諾福爾可曼格林 霍爾时，他的父亲Thomas Aldrich24岁，母亲Elizabeth Wood24岁。他于1526年与Ciceley Bishop在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和12个女儿的父母。他去世于1559年11月6日在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年58岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可斯沃德斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Aldrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Aldridge 1, from the Middle English personal names Alrich or Elrich and Aldrich or Eldrich.
History: The earliest recorded bearer of this surname in North America is George Alrich, who came from Derbyshire to MA in 1631.

variants.name: Arledge
meanings: English: variant of   Aldrich   or   Aldridge  . A few bearers of the name are recorded in southern England in the 17th–19th centuries, but the name appears to have died out in Britain.
History: Isaac Arledge died in Fairfield County, SC, in 1790.

variants.name: Aldridge
meanings: from the Middle English personal names Alrich or Elrich and Aldrich or Eldrich, representing any one of three Old English personal names, Æthelrīc, Ælfrīc, and Ealdrīc, formed respectively from æthel- ‘noble’, ælf ‘elf, sprite’, and (e)ald ‘old, honored’ + rīc ‘ruler’.

habitational name from Aldridge (Staffordshire), Aldridge Grove in Hampden (Buckinghamshire), or from a similarly named unidentified place in the West Midlands, recorded in Domesday Book as Alrewic, from Old English alor ‘alder’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Aldrich was born in 1501, in Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, England, his father, Thomas Aldrich, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Wood, was 24. He married Ciceley Bishop in 1526, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 12 daughters. He died on 6 November 1559, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Swardeston, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Aldrich est né en 1501, à Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Aldrich, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wood, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Ciceley Bishop en 1526, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 12 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1559, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Swardeston, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Aldrich 1501 in Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Aldrich 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Wood 24. Er hat 1526 in Norfolk, England Ciceley Bishop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1559 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England und wurde in Swardeston, Norfolk, England begraben.

Lui sposato Ciceley Bishop nel 1526, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 12 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Aldrichが1501年にイギリスノーフォルクマングレン ハルで生まれた時，父Thomas Aldrichは24歳，母Elizabeth Woodは24歳であった。1526年にイギリスノーフォルクでCiceley Bishopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼は1559年11月6日にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで58歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスワーデストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Aldrich(이)가 1501년 영국 노르폴크 만그린 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Aldrich(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Wood(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1526년 영국 노르폴크에서 Ciceley Bishop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 11월 6일 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 스워데스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Aldrich nasceu em 1501, em Mangreen Hall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Aldrich, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wood, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Ciceley Bishop em 1526, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 12 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1559, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Swardeston, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Aldrich родился в 1501 г. в местности мангрин холл, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Aldrich было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wood, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Ciceley Bishop в 1526 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 12 дочерей. Он умер 6 ноября 1559 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности свардестон, норфолк, Англия.
